signals.headline: Screen India CEPA Tariff Schedules
signals.summary: Uranium & critical minerals duty reductions live this week. Review CEPA Annex on mineral exports via Global Affairs Canada portal.

signals.headline: Contact Trade Commissioner for India Market Entry
signals.summary: Canada-India CEPA uranium ($2.6B deal) requires immediate engagement with Global Affairs Canada trade commissioners. Submit inquiry this week to access preferential tariff codes and CEPA documentation

signals.headline: Register for Trade Commissioner Pulse Market Briefing
signals.summary: Contact Trade Commissioner Service (TCS) India desk to secure real-time quota allocation intelligence. Critical this week as quota window opens.

signals.headline: Screen Iran Supply Chain Exposure
signals.summary: Use Trade Commissioner Service Iran Sanctions Compliance Checker to audit vendor networks. Five new designations require immediate verification this week to prevent legal exposure.

signals.headline: Register with EU AI Act Compliance Portal
signals.summary: Contact Trade Commissioner Service (TCS) EU desk to obtain AIDA framework certification letter required for registration. Critical this week—registration window closes 90 days; early filers gain marke

signals.headline: Screen Trade Commissioner Service Defence Alerts
signals.summary: TCS NATO Market Access alerts via Global Affairs Canada — intelligence on Germany, Poland, UK defence RFQs posted this week. Essential for capturing Bundeswehr and European procurement windows.
